login.title: Port AI
login.subtitle: Sign in to the port traffic dashboard
login.footerHint: Use your Port AI operator account.

errors.invalid_phone: Enter a valid phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +48123456789).
errors.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.invalid_token: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.auth_not_configured: Authentication is not configured on the server (JWT_SECRET in backend/.env).
errors.auth_login_failed: Server login error — restart the backend and check logs.
errors.auth_register_failed: Server registration error — restart the backend and check logs.
errors.server_error: Server error. Restart backend (uvicorn on port 8001) and ensure only one process is listening.
errors.network_error: Cannot reach the server. Start backend: uvicorn main:app --port 8001
